name: DSG ONE - Control Plane for AI Operations
description: Don't trust AI. Verify every decision. DSG ONE is the control plane for AI operations across your organization. Monitor every action. Verify before execution. Audit and replay proof. Optimize costs. Every AI decision has an owner—DSG ONE proves it.
shortDescription: Monitor. Verify. Audit. Optimize. One platform for AI accountability.

views.name: payment.detail
views.title: DSG ONE - Policy Verification
views.description: Real-time policy evaluation and compliance status. Every payment decision is verified, audited, and provable.

content_security_policy.purpose: Connect to DSG governance API for policy evaluation and audit recording

features.title: 👀 Monitor
features.description: See every AI operation in your live dashboard. Real-time events, usage tracking, and alerts for high-risk decisions. Know what's happening across all your integrations.

features.title: ✅ Verify
features.description: Prevent mistakes before AI acts. Policy enforcement gates every decision. Human approval for critical operations. Risk detection blocks uncertain actions.

features.title: 📜 Audit
features.description: Prove every decision. Tamper-proof audit trail with SHA-256 hashing. Replay any decision years later for testing or regulatory proof. Export compliance evidence.

features.title: 📈 Optimize
features.description: Control costs and reduce risk. Track AI spending by provider and operation type. Get insights to prevent budget surprises. Export reports for compliance audits.

permissions.name: External access
permissions.description: The app sends policy decisions and audit logs to the DSG control plane for governance enforcement.
